The '''''Grey Damsel''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] under the command of Rebel [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bok (Mon Calamari)|Bok]].

==History==
[[File:GreyDamsel-DeadBridge.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The ''Grey Damsel''{{'s}} bridge, following the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper's]] slaughter of the crew.]]

The ''Grey Damsel'' escaped the [[attack on Tak Base]] and jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], evacuating an unknown number of base personnel. However, its entire crew was killed by a [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] that managed to sneak onboard.

The ''Grey Damsel'' emerged from hyperspace near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where it crashed into the sandy dunes. [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] scavengers recovered the seemingly defunct dark trooper from the crash site, however, its systems came back online and caused devastation among the Jawas and other inhabitants of the planet before the locals finally put it down for good.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}} {{1st}}
